title: Arrive and check in
objective: Comunicarse en un hotel básico, confirmar una reserva y pedir información sencilla sobre la estancia.

activities.prompt: You arrive at a hotel. What do you say?
activities.feedback_correct: Es la frase natural para informar que tienes una reserva.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una frase con have y reservation.

activities.feedback_correct: What time is breakfast? pregunta la hora del desayuno.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca una actividad del hotel que tenga una hora.

activities.feedback_correct: Es la pregunta para saber si hay internet inalámbrico.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la opción relacionada con conexión a internet.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con su función.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces frases útiles al llegar a un hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la frase confirma, pregunta o solicita algo.

activities.feedback_correct: Can I have...? es una petición cortés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Can I have y añade el objeto.

activities.prompt: Guest: Hello, I have a reservation under Garcia. Clerk: Yes, here it is. Room 205. Breakfast is from seven to ten, and the elevator is on your left.
activities.question: What is the room number?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el número después de Room.

activities.prompt: Hello, I have a reservation under Garcia. What time is breakfast? Is there Wi-Fi? Thank you.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comunicar tus necesidades básicas en un hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica reservation y breakfast lentamente y usa entonación amable.

activities.instruction: Lee la información del hotel y responde.
activities.prompt: Welcome to the Blue Hotel. Check-out is at eleven. Breakfast is on the first floor from seven to ten. The elevator is next to reception. Wi-Fi is free.
activities.question: Where is breakfast?
activities.feedback_correct: El texto dice on the first floor.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la ubicación después de Breakfast is.

activities.prompt: Write a ten-line hotel dialogue. Include a reservation, room number, breakfast time, Wi-Fi question, and one request for help.
Check into a hotel after a long journey. Confirm your reservation, ask about breakfast and transport, request one item, and respond to the receptionist.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes resolver necesidades esenciales al llegar a un hotel.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa una recepción virtual y repite las frases clave según tus errores.
